title: Implement QC-GLDPC construction with SOGRAND check nodes
description:
Implement Generalized LDPC (GLDPC) codes with quasi-cyclic structure and eBCH check nodes, as described in Lentmaier (2010).

## QC-GLDPC Construction

The adjacency matrix uses circulant permutation matrices:

```
Gamma = [[I_n^(0), I_n^(0), ..., I_n^(0)],
         [I_n^(0), I_n^(1), ..., I_n^(n-1)]]
```

where `I_n^(i)` is an n×n identity matrix right-rotated by i positions.

- Code parameters: `(n², n² - 2n(n-k))` where (n,k) is the component code.
- Target: **(1024, 640) QC-GLDPC** code.

## Decoding

BP decoding where each check node runs full SISO-SOGRAND instead of the usual boxplus/min-sum operation:

- Variable node updates are standard BP.
- Check node updates invoke SOGRAND on the eBCH component code with the incoming variable-to-check messages as input LLRs.
- SOGRAND output provides the check-to-variable messages.

## Acceptance Criteria

- QC-GLDPC construction produces a valid (1024, 640) code.
- Encoder works correctly (all codewords satisfy all check node constraints).
- BP decoder with SOGRAND check nodes converges.
- Can be used in the simulation framework.

## Location

New module `crates/gf2-coding/src/gldpc/`, or extend `crates/gf2-coding/src/ldpc/`.
